body:

Subject: Re: (sans sujet)


Hi Sarah, 
  
i come back to the shop for fix my phone, i can't call Jeffrey today, can you tell him if he can call me wednesday in the afternoon ? (the day where i will get back my phone), 
thanks, 
  
ps : i don't remember if this email adress is good, can you answer me, please ? 
  
thanks, bye, Marine.
